human_review_reason: While the record accurately describes the source as a non-archivable listing page and correctly identifies its limitations, CORE RULE #6 explicitly requires rejection for listing pages. The human reviewer should confirm: (1) whether to reject per rules, or (2) whether archival value exists in documenting the ECB publication framework itself.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/landing page for the ECB Economic Bulletin section, not an actual archived release. The page describes what the Economic Bulletin is (economic and monetary information released eight times yearly, two weeks after each ECB policy meeting) and provides links to download specific issues. No actual economic data, policy analysis, or market-relevant content is present in this source.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page provides no actionable macro or market information. It is a structural metadata page describing the ECB Economic Bulletin publication framework. Researchers seeking ECB economic analysis should access the specific downloadable issues rather than this landing page. Per CORE RULE #6, listing pages are not archiveable.
